headline: 3 Healthcare Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: From novel pharmaceuticals to telemedicine, most healthcare companies are on a mission to drive better patient outcomes. Those leading the charge have realized strong financial performance, and over the past six months, the industry’s 7.6% return has closely followed the S&P 500.
